assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets options.KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms to an array containing a SigningAlgorithmOptions for RsaSha256 with UseX509Certificate = true
assertions.rationale: RS256 is included but UseX509Certificate = true is NOT set.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs includes a SigningAlgorithmOptions for EcdsaSha256 (ES256) in the SigningAlgorithms array
assertions.rationale: ES256 is included in the array.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs defines a client with ClientId 'mobile-app' that has AllowedIdentityTokenSigningAlgorithms containing EcdsaSha256 or 'ES256'
The RS256 algorithm entry appears before ES256 in the SigningAlgorithms array to be the default
assertions.rationale: RsaSha256 appears first in the array.
